rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input assumptions in type contracts.
generic_rules: Declare helper booleans for range checks with explicit variable names.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for boolean helper declarations in AGREE contracts.
Wrap AGREE annex content in `annex agree { ... };` block syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts.
